allow: Bash(ssh -i ubuntu-user-key.pem -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@172.17.2.185 'echo "=== next-server process tree ==="; ps -o pid,ppid,user,etime,cmd -p 56554 2>/dev/null; PPID56=$\(ps -o ppid= -p 56554 | tr -d " "\); echo; echo "=== parent \(ppid=$PPID56\) ==="; ps -o pid,ppid,user,etime,cmd -p $PPID56 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "=== full ancestry ==="; pid=56554; while [ "$pid" != "1" ] && [ -n "$pid" ]; do ps -o pid,ppid,user,cmd -p $pid --no-headers; pid=$\(ps -o ppid= -p $pid 2>/dev/null | tr -d " "\); done; echo; echo "=== shell rc files referencing ANTHROPIC ==="; grep -Hn "ANTHROPIC" ~/.bashrc ~/.bash_profile ~/.profile ~/.zshrc ~/.zprofile /etc/environment /etc/profile 2>/dev/null | sed "s/=.*/=<REDACTED>/"; echo; echo "=== systemd unit \(if any\) ==="; systemctl list-units --type=service --all 2>/dev/null | grep -i reckon; sudo -n find /etc/systemd/system -maxdepth 2 -name "*reckon*" 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "=== pm2 / process managers ==="; which pm2 && pm2 list 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "=== swap file owner ==="; ls -la ~/reckon/.env.production.swp 2>/dev/null; sudo -n lsof ~/reckon/.env.production.swp 2>/dev/null || lsof ~/reckon/.env.production.swp 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -i ubuntu-user-key.pem -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@172.17.2.185 'echo "=== who is logged in ==="; who; echo; echo "=== vim swap status ==="; ls -la ~/reckon/.env.production.swp; sudo -n fuser ~/reckon/.env.production.swp 2>&1 || fuser ~/reckon/.env.production.swp 2>&1; echo; echo "=== any vim processes ==="; pgrep -af "vim|nvim|vi " || echo "\(none\)"; echo; echo "=== claude pid 58042 details ==="; ps -o pid,ppid,user,etime,cmd -p 58042 2>/dev/null || echo "\(process gone\)"; if [ -d /proc/58042 ]; then PPID58=$\(ps -o ppid= -p 58042 | tr -d " "\); echo "parent:"; ps -o pid,ppid,user,cmd -p $PPID58 2>/dev/null; echo "cwd: $\(sudo -n readlink /proc/58042/cwd 2>/dev/null || readlink /proc/58042/cwd 2>/dev/null\)"; fi; echo; echo "=== current .env.production key prefix ==="; awk -F= "/^ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=/ {print substr\(\\$2,1,18\)\\"...\\"substr\(\\$2,length\(\\$2\)-3\)}" ~/reckon/.env.production')
